name: clean-export-fixture
comment: CLEAN ingest fixture (Phase-11 Plan 02 / PIPE-04). The GREEN canary — the input-side analog of the minimal/editorial GREEN-on-corpus role. Every dependency is allowlisted in scripts/template-allowlist.ts ALLOWED_IMPORT_SPECIFIERS (react, react-dom, lucide-react) so the dep parse produces ZERO unknown-dependency flags AND zero must-strip findings. The green assertion is specifically `findings.filter(f => f.tier === 'must-strip').length === 0` — flags on unknown deps are PERMITTED in clean, only must-strip must be zero. App.tsx contains a plain heading + a relative import, no secrets/external-origins/danger-html.
